Notes: Single UPDATE contains two identical add_rr operations for the same owner/type/class/RDATA. The post-update QUERY checks whether the RRset is present once and whether the server accepted or rejected the packet.

Steps.Description: Add the same A RR for host1.campus.edu. twice in one UPDATE, with no prerequisites.

Steps.Name: host1.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe the resulting A RRset after the duplicate add_rr UPDATE.
